issue.title: AdvancedProfiler ValueError stopping action that was never started
issue.body: AdvancedProfiler raises ValueError when stopping run_test_evaluation that was never started. Steps to reproduce: run validation with AdvancedProfiler enabled. Expected behavior: profiler handles missing action safely. Suggested fix: guard stop calls and add a regression test.

reasons: Python testing bug with concrete reproduction and regression path.

issue.title: How can I disable filename abbreviations in tab-autocompletion results
issue.body: Tab completion abbreviates long filenames in the terminal UI. Steps to reproduce: create long file names and use IPython completion. Expected behavior: configuration can disable abbreviation. Suggested fix: expose a config flag and verify with completion tests.

reasons: Python CLI issue with testable behavior.

issue.title: [feat] Log parent package when erroring during dependency install
issue.body: When uv fails during dependency install, the error does not show the parent package that introduced the dependency. Expected behavior: CLI logs the parent package chain. Suggested fix: include parent package context in resolver errors and add CLI snapshot tests.

repository.description: Fast Python package manager and CLI

reasons: Rust implementation but strong Python CLI profile fit.

issue.title: (aws-glue-alpha): struct schema produces unsupported inputStrings
issue.body: Schema.struct generates invalid inputStrings for nested Glue structs. Steps to reproduce: build nested struct schema and query with Athena. Suggested fix: update TypeScript schema rendering.

reasons: Not Python/data/CLI despite high repo influence.

issue.title: [BEGINNER] Build Currency Converter CLI
issue.body: Build a beginner currency converter CLI script. Use any public API and print the converted amount.

reasons: Toy beginner script should not fill serious Python/data ranking.

issue.title: 1password import does not archive state archived entries
issue.body: 1Password import skips archived entries. Steps to reproduce: export 1pux with archived items and import. Expected behavior: archived items are archived in Bitwarden. Suggested fix: update importer mapping and add importer tests.

repository.description: Password manager web, desktop, browser and CLI clients
